settings.title: Enhanced Mat
settings.copy: Featuring reinforced stitching and enhanced lay-flat mat technology, JumpSport extends your usable space and provides added protection.

settings.title: Arched Legs
settings.copy: Smart engineering meets real-world stability. Arched legs keep your rebounder steady, stackable, and tip-resistant—so every jump feels solid, every time.

settings.title: Premium Elastic Cords
settings.copy: Experience the premium bounce that made us famous. Our long-lasting and smooth EnduroLast™ elastic cords are quiet, joint-friendly, and adjustable to fit any intensity.

settings.title: More Space
settings.copy: Be free to move more. The durable jumping surface extends over the cords to add protection and additional space for increased creativity.

settings.title: Why JumpSport Fitness Trampolines Are Built Different
JumpSport 2025 Gift Guide
settings.copy: Find the perfect gift for every type of mover — from beginners to pros, and every bounce in between.

settings.title: Leaders in Low-Impact Fitness and Joint-Friendly Movement
settings.copy: For over 25 years, JumpSport has engineered trampolines trusted by trainers, rehab specialists, and active families worldwide. We’re proud to lead the rebound fitness movement with science-backed designs and a focus on safety, joy, and performance.

settings.title: Your Guide to Choosing the Right Fitness Trampoline
settings.copy: Find the right rebounder and training tools for how you move. From beginners to performance athletes—and every bounce in between—this guide helps you build a fitness routine that fits your goals, space, and style.

settings.title: Low-Impact Cardio and Weight Loss
settings.copy: Rebounding is the ultimate low-impact, full-body workout, renowned for enhancing cardiovascular health and facilitating weight loss. It effectively boosts metabolism, burns calories, and strengthens the heart muscle, making it an essential activity for achieving optimal fitness and health.

settings.title: Wellness, Recovery, and Joint Health
settings.copy: Rebounding is celebrated for its substantial mental health benefits, combining physical activity with stress reduction and enjoyment. It enhances proprioception and equilibrium, which are critical for maintaining and improving balance and coordination.

settings.title: Balance, Coordination, and Mental Health
settings.copy: Rebounding is a key component of overall wellness, notably improving lymphatic flow and supporting faster recovery. Its gentle, low-impact nature allows the body to heal and rejuvenate efficiently, making it an indispensable exercise for holistic health and recovery.

settings.title: Trampoline Frame
settings.copy:
Selecting the right trampoline frame ensures you get the comfort, performance, and convenience you need for your fitness routine.

The 39" frame is a great choice for smaller spaces or those who want a compact, versatile option, while the 44" provides a more spacious jumping area, perfect for taller users, heavier bouncers, or anyone who wants extra room to move. 

Folding frames are ideal for smaller spaces, easy storage, or on-the-go use. 3-piece self-assembly frames are a budget friendly option with the same stability as our other frames. Think about your height, space, and how you’ll use it to find your perfect match.
settings.glance:
• 39" Frame: Compact, versatile, great for smaller spaces.
  • 44" Frame: Spacious surface, ideal for taller/heavier users or bigger movement.
  • Folding Frames: Portable, easy to store or travel with.
  • 3-Piece Frames: Durable, self assembly, budget friendly.
  • Usage Needs: Choose based on space and workout style.

settings.title: Firmness
settings.copy:
One of our best features is our unique cord system that gives you the freedom to customize your bounce firmness. 

A softer bounce delivers a deeper, smoother rebound, increasing workout intensity while being gentle on joints. A firmer bounce provides a shorter, quicker rebound, making it ideal for fast-paced exercises and high repetitions. 

Adjustable cords allow you to customize the firmness and extend the life of your trampoline by tightening the cords as they wear. Cords can also be replaced or upgraded over time, expanding the bounce experience.
settings.glance:
• Softer Bounce: Deeper, smoother rebound, gentle on joints.
  • Firmer Bounce: Quick, more stable, perfect for fast choreography or stability workouts.
  • Adjustability: Customize bounce firmness and extend longevity as cords wear.
  • Maintenance: Check & adjust cords regularly for optimal performance.

settings.title: Weight Capacity
settings.copy:
JumpSport trampolines provide a sturdy, stable platform that can be adapted to the bouncers’ weight or bounce intensity. Understanding weight capacity ensures safe, durable trampoline performance.

Weight capacity includes two factors: static load, the maximum weight the frame and cords can hold, and user weight rating, the highest weight for safe, active use during workouts. 

Depending on the model, our trampolines support weights from 225 to 325 pounds, offering a range of options for different users. For heavy or frequent use, PRO models provide extra cords and adjustable tension for added durability and comfort. Selecting a trampoline that matches the highest user weight ensures safety, performance, and longevity for every workout.
settings.glance:
• User Weight Rating: Depending on model, 225 to 325 pounds.
  • PRO Models: More cords for a firmer bounce.
  • 44” Models: Extra Firm cords for heavy bouncers or frequent use.
  • Durability: Designed to handle high-intensity, long-term use.
  • Safety Tip: Select weight rating based on the heaviest active user.
  • Customizable: Adjustable cords for personalized tension and performance.

settings.title: Mat Styles
settings.copy:
Are you a skirt mat or padded petal person? The mat style you chose can affect comfort, stability on the trampoline, and your overall jumping experience.

Skirt-style mats offer a lay-flat extended skirt over the bungees, maximizing the jumping area for unrestricted movement. Padded petal mats provide extra padding over the cords for enhanced comfort and safety, additionally making them ideal if you plan to lay on the mat or use your hands during workouts. 

All models include reinforced stitching and lay-flat mat technology, keeping the jumping skirt or padded petals secure for added protection and space. Select a mat style based on your comfort, safety, and workout needs.
settings.glance:
• Skirt-Style Mats: Structured surface for maximum jumping area.
  • Padded Petal Mats: Extra padding for added comfort and safety.
  • Lay-Flat Technology: Prevents lifting for secure, stable performance.
  • Comfort: Padded petals are ideal for hand or mat-based use.
  • Durability: High-quality materials designed for long-term use.
  • Safety: Minimized cord exposure with padded extensions.
